question:
Nodes are randomly marked dead

Some of my devices keep getting marked as dead and come back after a while. Why does this happen?

Multisensor 6 suddenly reports radiation

My Aeotec Multisensor 6 suddenly reports a radiation value. It doesn't even have a radiation sensor. Why?

How can I ping a device?

Is there a way to check via the API whether a node is reachable?

Network suddenly died

My network has always worked fine and suddenly nothing responds anymore. The controller is plugged into a Raspberry Pi.

How do I set up S2 security keys?

I want to include devices with Security S2. Where do I configure the network keys?

Updating device firmware

How can I perform an OTA firmware update of a Z-Wave device through zwave-js?

Z-Wave Long Range support

How do I enable and use Z-Wave Long Range with my 800 series controller?

Remote serial port over TCP

Can I connect to a controller that is exposed over the network with ser2net?

Using ESPHome device as adapter

Is it possible to use an ESPHome-based Z-Wave adapter with zwave-js?

Custom logging

How can I send zwave-js logs to my own logging system instead of the console?

Inclusion finds no new devices

I put the controller into inclusion mode but my new device is never found.

Configuration parameters are wrong

The config parameters shown for my device don't match its manual. Some are missing entirely.

Device does not send updates

My sensor works when I query it manually, but it never sends unsolicited reports.

How to create associations

How do I associate two devices with each other so one directly controls the other?

Heal network

How can I rebuild the routes of my devices after moving the controller?

Sniffing Z-Wave traffic

How can I capture and inspect the raw Z-Wave radio traffic in my network?

Minimal example

What is the minimal code needed to start the driver and control a device?

Custom device config files

How can I load my own device configuration files that are not part of zwave-js?

Where do I start debugging?

Something is wrong with my network. What information do I need to collect before opening an issue?

Controlling multiple devices at once

Can I send a command to several nodes at the same time using multicast?

What is a value ID?

The docs keep mentioning ValueID. What does it consist of and how do I use it?

Testing an unreleased fix

How do I install zwave-js directly from a GitHub branch to test a fix before it is released?
